qa_pairs.question: What is the augmented JSON used for in AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: The augmented JSON is used for multiple different inferences across seeds or across variations of other features, such as a ligand.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find documentation regarding AlphaFold3's inputs?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find documentation regarding AlphaFold3's inputs at their GitHub page: [https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/input.md].

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find documentation regarding AlphaFold3's outputs?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find documentation regarding AlphaFold3's outputs at their GitHub page: [https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/output.md].

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find documentation regarding AlphaFold3's performance?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find documentation regarding AlphaFold3's performance at their GitHub page: [https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/blob/main/docs/performance.md].

qa_pairs.question: What kind of features can be varied when using augmented JSON for inferences in AlphaFold3?
qa_pairs.answer: Features such as a ligand can be varied when using augmented JSON for inferences in AlphaFold3.
